$comment: Same-precedence chain associativity, runtime-argument operands (nothing const-foldable: every chain operand is a function parameter or call result, so the LEFT shape must survive codegen, not just const-eval). LEFT-assoc: sub_add=(50-10)+2=42, div_div=(100/5)/2=10, sub_sub=(20-6)-4=10, main=((42-10)-10)+20=42. The old RIGHT-recursive mis-shape evaluates sub_add=50-(10+2)=38, div_div=100/(5/2)=50, sub_sub=20-(6-4)=18, main=38-(50-(18+20))=26 — a loudly different exit (26 vs 42), mod-256-safe. The `sub_add (50, ...)` call is deliberately SPACED: a postfix operator preceded by trivia used to wrap the whitespace leaf instead of the callee (H0001 at HIR lowering); this example is its runtime witness across all targets.
